message:
simplify: merge identical OS cases and clean up filteredEnv

- Merged identical darwin/linux cases in OSVersion()
- Simplified deny() to return the boolean expression directly
- Removed redundant allow map in filteredEnv — non-denied vars are
  kept by default, so the allow-list was a no-op

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
